subject: feat(cards): reveal action links on card tap with pill buttons
body:
Cards now show links only when active (clicked/tapped). Default state
shows title, badges, description, and tech stack cleanly. Active state
adds a primary ring highlight and slides in pill-style action buttons.

Only one card active at a time — tap another to switch, tap same card
or click outside to dismiss. Links use event.stopPropagation() so
clicking a button navigates without toggling the card.

Replaces the old card-hover lift effect with card-interactive which
combines subtle hover lift with the active reveal pattern.

Tags: ui, cards, interaction, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: css-migration
Semver: minor
